name: supplierScore
invariants: output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.suppliers.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.totalScore) && typeof s.supplier === 'string' && typeof s.tier === 'string'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler; reads artifact.data.suppliers. totalScore = round(quality*0.3 + delivery*0.3 + price*0.2 + responsiveness*0.2) with parseFloat||defaults, then tier (preferred>=85, approved>=70, conditional>=50, else at-risk) + sort desc. POISON: parseFloat collapses garbage to per-field defaults (70/80/70/70) so totalScore stays FINITE. Component: SupplyChainActionPanel.actSup renders suppliers[].supplier/totalScore/tier + topSupplier + atRisk. Not assassin-driven; pinned by server/tests/supplychain-lens-macros.test.js.
